Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Installing a Let's Encrypt TLS Certificate on a Brother Printer with Certbot 32 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. The European AllSky7 fireball network 94 upvotes, 7 comments
  3. Whistler: Live eBPF Programming from the Common Lisp REPL 118 upvotes, 14 comments
  4. Why so many control rooms were seafoam green (2025) 933 upvotes, 191 comments
  5. DOOM Over DNS 328 upvotes, 87 comments
  6. Show HN: I put an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as its transport layer 294 upvotes, 84 comments
  7. QRV Operating System: QNX on RISC-V 40 upvotes, 7 comments
  8. Running Tesla Model 3's computer on my desk using parts from crashed cars 920 upvotes, 320 comments
  9. People inside Microsoft are fighting to drop mandatory Microsoft Account 25 upvotes, 4 comments
  10. My minute-by-minute response to the LiteLLM malware attack 408 upvotes, 152 comments
  11. HyperAgents: Self-referential self-improving agents 218 upvotes, 76 comments
  12. Local Bernstein theory, and lower bounds for Lebesgue constants 34 upvotes, 7 comments
  13. This picture broke my brain [3B1B video] 79 upvotes, 30 comments
  14. Gzip decompression in 250 lines of Rust 30 upvotes, 9 comments
  15. Iran-linked hackers claim breach of FBI director's personal email 65 upvotes, 26 comments
  16. $500 GPU outperforms Claude Sonnet on coding benchmarks 407 upvotes, 224 comments
  17. A Faster Alternative to Jq 267 upvotes, 160 comments
  18. Anatomy of the .claude/ Folder 35 upvotes, 14 comments
  19. EMachines never obsolete PCs: More than a meme 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. The 'Paperwork Flood': How I Drowned a Bureaucrat Before Dinner 289 upvotes, 187 comments
  21. Everything old is new again: memory optimization 117 upvotes, 80 comments
  22. Apple discontinues the Mac Pro 534 upvotes, 462 comments
  23. Rank the 50 best Apple products 12 upvotes, 4 comments
  24. Hold on to Your Hardware 369 upvotes, 313 comments
  25. Schedule tasks on the web 231 upvotes, 190 comments
  26. The Legibility of Serif and Sans Serif Typefaces (2022) 63 upvotes, 45 comments
  27. We rewrote JSONata with AI in a day, saved $500k/year 229 upvotes, 207 comments
  28. Anthropic's Claude loses its >99% uptime in Q1 2026 27 upvotes, 20 comments
  29. Hong Kong Police Can Now Demand Phone Passwords Under New Security Rules 73 upvotes, 70 comments
  30. Rising Air-Conditioning Use Intensifies Global Warming 9 upvotes, 5 comments

Last generated 11:30pm, 27 March 2026. Source here.
